history.prodrome_description: Severe frontal headache, photophobia, neck stiffness, vomiting; rapidly progressive over 48 hours.

imaging.imaging_text_summary: Diffuse cerebral edema with effacement of cortical sulci and basal cisternal enhancement; findings consistent with primary amebic meningoencephalitis.

results.result: Motile trophozoites consistent with Naegleria fowleri

adjudication.anchoring_documentation: Anchored to MMWR 2025 splash pad-associated PAM case, Pulaski County Arkansas (PMID 40146665). Demographic and CSF parameters within reported case ranges.

provenance.inclusion_decision_rationale: Fixture canonical PAM case for schema TDD validation; values verified against MMWR 2025 (PMID 40146665) and CDC PAM 2017 case definition.

narrative_es: Adolescente varón de 16 años, previamente sano, con cuadro de 5 días de fiebre alta (39.8 C), cefalea frontal severa, fotofobia y rigidez de cuello progresiva. Antecedente de exposición a parque acuatico (splash pad) hace 7 dias. LCR con WBC 4200/mm3 (92% neutrofilos), glucosa 28 mg/dL, proteina 280 mg/dL, lactato 6.8 mmol/L. Examen directo de LCR positivo para trofozoitos moviles. RM con edema cerebral difuso y realce meningeo basal.
narrative_en: 16-year-old previously healthy male, 5 days of high fever (39.8 C), severe frontal headache, photophobia, and progressive neck stiffness. History of splash pad exposure 7 days prior. CSF WBC 4200/mm3 (92% neutrophils), glucose 28 mg/dL, protein 280 mg/dL, lactate 6.8 mmol/L. CSF wet mount positive for motile trophozoites. MRI with diffuse cerebral edema and basal meningeal enhancement.
